name: claude
description: Use the local Claude Code CLI from Codex to diagnose setup, recommend skills, and produce read-only implementation plans.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose Claude Code setup and ask Claude for read-only plans from Codex.
interface.longDescription: A minimal Codex plugin that checks local Claude Code CLI readiness, recommends Claude skills, previews prompts, and asks Claude to produce read-only implementation plans. Claude plans; Codex validates and implements.
